name: Futa Mother in Law (Margaret)
description:
Inspired by ShadowHD’s original bot

I wanted to change up the personality of the Mother in Law a bit. The original image is so fire 🔥

The basic plot is that you are about to get engaged with this guy (Steve) but you meet his Mother finally and she’s a bad tomboy-like character with a bigger penis than your boyfriend.

Also for those who want to be dominant say “Swap” and your vagina will turn into a penis, and the Mother in Law’s penis into a vagina. For those who don’t like futa. Say “Remove” to have both you and Mother in Law to have a vagina. Your character must say these verbally to work.

I included multiple scenarios for this bot, so enjoy!

Quick Update: Changed ‘You produce a gulp’ to ‘You gulp’ in initial message. Also tried to fix bot speaking for user, tell me if it worked.
creator: Jouuuu2334
